title: Harris Ultimate Woodwork Gloss Paint Brush 1"
features: This Ultimate brush with its specialised blend of filaments has been designeed so you get the finest finish when painting with Gloss Eggshell or Satin paints
The patented No-Loss* technology s no bristle loss while you are painting

This slim 1 inch brush is excellent for painting wooden trim such as skirting boards door architraves stair banisters window sills and window frames with oil based paints like Gloss Eggshell and Satin
For best results rub the brush with a clean hand before use to remove any dust particles Do not wet

Our Ultimate paint brushes have been made to last After painting with gloss satin or eggshell paints use a specialised cleaner such as white spirit to clean the brush Refer to the paint tin for further guidance *Bristle loss may occur if left to soak or in a damp area
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Three Quality Levels To Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers good value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier. Harris 1 inch Ultimate Woodwork Gloss Paint Brush Contents 1 x 1 inch paint brush For painting smaller interior woodwork areas A step up from our Seriously Good Woodwork Gloss brushes, this brush gives the ultimate finish and has improved paint pick up. Ideal for painting flat sections of wooden trim such as skirting boards, stair banisters and doors with gloss, eggshell and satin paints. For best results rub the brush with a clean hand before use to remove any dust particles. Do not wet. Doing a Painting Project Don't forget to team your Ultimate Woodwork Gloss paint brushes with the 4" Ultimate Woodwork Gloss Roller Set!
